name: Arden Angel
oracleText: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, if Arden Angel is in your graveyard, roll a four-sided die. If the result is 1, return Arden Angel from your graveyard to the battlefield.

name: Ashuza's Breath
oracleText: For each creature, choose a number from 0 to 2 at random. Ashuza's Breath deals that much damage to that creature.

name: Camato Scout
oracleText: As Camato Scout enters, choose a basic land type at random. Camato Scout has landwalk of the chosen type.

name: Hapato's Might
oracleText: Target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is a number from 0 to 6 chosen at random.

name: Lydari Druid
oracleText: When Lydari Druid enters, for each land on the battlefield, choose a basic land type at random. Those lands become the land types chosen this way. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

name: Lydari Elephant
oracleText: As Lydari Elephant enters, choose two numbers from 3 to 7 at random. Lydari Elephant's power is equal to the first number chosen and its toughness equal to the second number chosen.

name: Murgish Cemetery
oracleText: {3}{B}, Discard a card: Create an X/X black Zombie creature token, where X is a number from 2 to 6 chosen at random.

name: Saji's Torrent
oracleText: Tap X creatures, where X is a number from 0 to 5 chosen at random.

name: Tornellan Protector
oracleText: {T}: Until end of turn, each time damage is dealt to target creature or player, prevent X of that damage, where X is a number from 1 to 3 chosen at random each time.

name: Velukan Dragon
oracleText: Flying Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, roll a six-sided die. This creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the result minus 1.
